### run_tutorials

>  run_tutorials (project:Optional[str]=None, timeout:int=600,
>                     allow_errors:bool=False)

*Execute tutorial notebooks to verify they run without errors.*

Runs notebooks in tutorials/ directory using nbconvert or execnb.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>project</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Project path or alias. Uses current project if not specified.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>timeout</td>
<td>int</td>
<td>600</td>
<td>Timeout in seconds per notebook (default: 600).</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>allow_errors</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>False</td>
<td>If True, continue even if a notebook fails.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Dict</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Result with ‘results’ list of per-notebook
outcomes.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### scan_notebook_errors

>  scan_notebook_errors (project:Optional[str]=None, include_nbs:bool=True,
>                            include_tutorials:bool=True,
>                            max_trace_chars:int=1200)

*Scan notebooks for existing error outputs without executing them.*

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>project</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Project path or alias. Uses current project if not specified.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>include_nbs</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>True</td>
<td>If True, scan notebooks in nbs/ directory.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>include_tutorials</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>True</td>
<td>If True, scan notebooks in tutorials/ directory.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>max_trace_chars</td>
<td>int</td>
<td>1200</td>
<td>Maximum characters to include from traceback (default: 1200).</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Dict</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Result with ‘errors’ list of notebooks with error
outputs.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## Test Generation

<a

### generate_pytests

>  generate_pytests (project:Optional[str]=None, dry_run:bool=False,
>                        long_test_eval_false:bool=True)

*Generate pytest-compatible modules from notebook test cells.*

Extracts test code from notebooks (cells with asserts or test functions)
and generates pytest modules under tests/.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>project</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Project path or alias. Uses current project if not specified.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>dry_run</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>False</td>
<td>If True, don’t write files, just report what would be done.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>long_test_eval_false</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>True</td>
<td>If True, add ‘#| eval: false’ to long test cells (40+ lines).</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Dict</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Result with ‘generated’ list and ‘modified_cells’
list.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<a

### scaffold_test_utils

>  scaffold_test_utils (project:Optional[str]=None)

*Create the standard nbs/99_tests/00_utils.ipynb notebook.*

Creates a testing utilities notebook with shared helpers and mocks for
use across the test suite.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />

</tr>

<td></td>

exists.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>

### generate_stubs

>  generate_stubs (project:Optional[str]=None, out_path:Optional[str]=None,
>                      include_methods:bool=True)

*Generate .pyi stub files for exported symbols.*

Scans notebooks for exported functions and classes, generating type stub
files for better IDE support.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>project</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Project path or alias. Uses current project if not specified.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>out_path</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Custom output path for the stub file.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>include_methods</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>True</td>
<td>If True, include method signatures in class stubs.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Dict</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Result with ‘out_file’ path.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

### aggregate_todos

>  aggregate_todos (project:Optional[str]=None, out_file:str='TODOs.md')

*Aggregate TODO comments from notebooks into a Markdown file.*

Scans all notebooks for TODO comments and collects them into a single
Markdown table.

<td>str</td>
<td>TODOs.md</td>
<td>Output filename (default: TODOs.md).</td>
</tr>

### coverage_report

>  coverage_report (project:Optional[str]=None, include_untested:bool=True)

*Generate test coverage report per notebook.*

Analyzes which exported functions/classes have associated test cells
(cells containing assert statements that reference them).

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>project</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Project path or alias. Uses current project if not specified.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>include_untested</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>True</td>
<td>If True, list functions/classes without tests.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Dict</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Result with ‘coverage’ per notebook and ‘untested’
symbols.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
